Featured

Haus der Energien

From 2% to 12% Conversion — How Helios Transformed Spiritual Content

6×Conversion Rate
40hSaved / Month
300%Engagement ↑

Challenge

Manual content creation was inconsistent, time-consuming, and disconnected from the spiritual energy patterns that resonated with HdE's audience.

Solution

We deployed Helios — a custom AI agent that tracks Schumann resonance data, astrological alignments, and trending spiritual topics. Combined with n8n automation flows, Helios generates and publishes daily content across all channels.

Results

Within 3 months, conversion rates jumped from 2% to 12%. Content engagement tripled. The team saved 40+ hours per month — time now spent on personal coaching sessions instead of writing social posts.

"It's like having a content team that understands energy. Helios doesn't just create posts — it creates the right posts at the right cosmic moment."

Your Story Could Be Next

Let's build something that delivers real results.

Start Your Project →
